data.title: Modify ticket dispatcher: source ticket-lib-api.sh and delegate show to ticket_show
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## File to Modify
plugins/dso/scripts/ticket (the dispatcher)

## Change
Replace exec bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-show.sh" "$@" for the show subcommand with source-style dispatch via ticket-lib-api.sh.

## Implementation Detail
In the show) case branch of the dispatcher:

```bash
show)
    _ensure_initialized
    if [[ "${DSO_TICKET_LEGACY:-}" == "1" ]]; then
        exec bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-show.sh" "$@"
    fi
    # Source library on first use (lazy load — only when show subcommand invoked)
    if ! declare -f ticket_show >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        source "$SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-lib-api.sh"
    fi
    _ticketlib_dispatch ticket_show "$@"
    ;;
```

## Performance Requirement
ticket show must complete in <0.15s per call on Linux reference hardware (measured via hyperfine over 10 warm runs). This is verifiable via: hyperfine --warmup 3 --runs 10 "ticket show <id>" after implementation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/ticket show case no longer exec's ticket-show.sh on the default path
  Verify: grep -A5 "show)" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket | grep -v "^#" | grep -q "source\|_ticketlib_dispatch"
- [ ] DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 still routes to exec bash ticket-show.sh
  Verify: grep -A8 "show)" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket | grep -q "DSO_TICKET_LEGACY"
- [ ] No-exec dispatch test passes: test_ticket_dispatcher_no_exec_to_show_script
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "PASS.*no_exec_to_show_script"
- [ ] Existing test-ticket-show.sh tests still pass (behavioral parity)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-show.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "PASS"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
